option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Smart Plant Watering v6 - Configuration Guide
## ⚠️ Nouveautés v6 (Breaking Changes)
Si vous migrez depuis v5, **vous devez reconfigurer l'automatisation** :
### Noms d'inputs changés (français → anglais) - `switch_arrosage` → `watering_switch` - `heure_arrosage` → `watering_time` - `capteur_pluie_jour` → `rain_sensor_today` - `seuil_pluie_annulation` → `rain_cancel_threshold` - `seuil_pluie_reduction` → `rain_reduction_threshold` - `duree_base_minutes` → `base_duration_minutes` - `duree_max_minutes` → `max_duration_minutes` - `duree_min_minutes` → `min_duration_minutes` - `compteur_jours_sans_pluie` → `dry_days_counter` - `capteur_volume_eau` → `water_volume_sensor` - `compteur_litres_cumules` → `cumulative_liters_counter` - `statut_actuel` → `current_status` - `historique_arrosages` → `watering_history` - `activer_notifications` → `enable_notifications` - `service_notification` → `notification_service`
### Helpers à recréer (avec préfixe smart_watering_) | Ancien ID | Nouveau ID v6 | |-----------|------------| | `input_number.jours_sans_pluie` | `input_number.smart_watering_dry_days` | | `input_number.arrosage_litres_cumules` | `input_number.smart_watering_total_liters` | | `input_text.arrosage_statut_actuel` | `input_text.smart_watering_status` | | `input_text.arrosage_historique` | `input_text.smart_watering_history` |
---
## Fonctionnement Global
Ce blueprint gère l'arrosage automatique adaptatif avec : - Calcul intelligent basé sur température, humidité, vent, pluie - Suivi des jours consécutifs sans pluie - Mesure réelle de la consommation via SONOFF SWV - Affichage temps réel du statut sur dashboard
## Prérequis
### 1. Créer les Helpers (Paramètres > Appareils & services > Assistants)
#### **input_number** (Nombre)
| Nom | ID | Min | Max | Pas | Usage | |-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-------| | Smart Watering - Dry Days | `input_number.smart_watering_dry_days` | 0 | 30 | 1 | Compteur de jours secs | | Smart Watering - Total Liters | `input_number.smart_watering_total_liters` | 0 | 99999 | 0.1 | Total litres utilisés |
#### **input_text** (Texte)
| Nom | ID | Longueur max | Usage | |-----|-----|--------------|-------| | Smart Watering - Status | `input_text.smart_watering_status` | 255 | Statut en temps réel | | Smart Watering - History | `input_text.smart_watering_history` | 255 | 5 dernières sessions |
### 2. Matériel
- **SONOFF SWV** (Smart Water Valve) connecté via Zigbee2MQTT ou ZHA - Capteurs exposés : - `sensor.<nom>_water_consumed` (volume cumulé en litres) - `switch.<nom>` (contrôle vanne)
### 3. Intégration Météo
- **IRM KMI** (Belgique) : `weather.irm_kmi_home` - Ou tout autre service météo exposant : température, humidité, vent, condition
## Configuration du Blueprint
Lors de la création de l'automatisation :
### Entités obligatoires - **Switch arrosage** : `switch.water_valve` (votre SONOFF SWV) - **Entité météo** : `weather.irm_kmi_home` - **Capteur volume** : `sensor.water_valve_water_consumed` - **Compteur jours secs** : `input_number.smart_watering_dry_days`
### Entités optionnelles - **Capteur pluie jour** : capteur pluie cumulée (si disponible) - **Compteur litres** : `input_number.smart_watering_total_liters` - **Statut actuel** : `input_text.smart_watering_status` - **Historique** : `input_text.smart_watering_history`
### Paramètres recommandés (Belgique) - **Heure déclenchement** : `06:00:00` - **Température normale** : `22°C` - **Seuil canicule** : `30°C` - **Pluie annulation** : `5mm` - **Pluie réduction** : `2mm` - **Durée base** : `60 min` - **Durée max** : `120 min` - **Durée min** : `15 min`
## Dashboard
Copiez le contenu de `watering_dashboard_example.yaml` dans votre dashboard Lovelace.
### Exemple d'affichage
``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Smart Watering Status │ ├─────────────────────────────────────┤ │ Current Status: ✅ Completed: │ │ 42.5L in 60min (22/05 06:58) │ │ │ │ Consecutive Dry Days: 3 │ │ Last Session: 42.5L (60min) │ └─────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Water Usage per Session │ ├─────────────────────────────────────┤ │ - 22/05: 42.5L - 60min, 24°C │ │ - 21/05: 38.2L - 55min, 22°C │ │ - 20/05: 45.1L - 65min, 26°C │ │ - 19/05: 31.4L - 45min, 19°C │ │ - 18/05: 48.9L - 70min, 28°C │ │ │ │ --- Total Cumulative: 205.9 L │ └─────────────────────────────────────┘ ```
## Logique de Calcul
``` Durée finale = Durée base × coef_temp × coef_humidité × coef_vent × coef_jours_secs × coef_pluie × coef_prévision ```
### Coefficients
| Facteur | Logique | |---------|---------| | ️ **Température** | +2% par °C au-dessus de 22°C, -2% en dessous | | **Humidité** | Référence 50%. +1% par point sous 50% | | ️ **Vent** | +5% par tranche de 10 km/h | | ☀️ **Jours secs** | +8% par jour sans pluie (≥2mm) | | ️ **Pluie jour** | Annulation si ≥5mm, réduction proportionnelle si ≥2mm | | **Prévision** | -50% si pluie probable >70%, -25% si >40% |
### Mise à jour du compteur jours secs - Si pluie ≥ 2mm → reset à 0 - Sinon → incrémente de 1
## Notifications
Activables ou désactivables. Format :
**Début :** ``` Smart watering started Duration: 60 min (base 60 min × coef 1.0) Details: ️ Temp: 24°C (coef 1.04) Humidity: 60% (coef 0.90) ️ Wind: 15 km/h (coef 1.08) ☀️ Dry days: 3 (coef 1.24) ️ Rain: 0mm (coef 1.00) Forecast: 0% (coef 1.00) ```
**Fin :** ``` ✅ Watering complete Watering finished after 60 minutes. Water used: 42.5 L (measured by SWV) ```
**Annulation :** ``` ️ Watering cancelled Watering cancelled: Sufficient rain today (6mm). Temperature: 18°C | Humidity: 85% ```
## ️ Dépannage
### Le statut ne s'affiche pas - Vérifiez que les `input_text` sont créés - Vérifiez les IDs dans la config du blueprint
### Les litres sont à 0 - Attendez 10 sec après fermeture vanne (délai intégré) - Vérifiez que le capteur `water_consumed` fonctionne dans les états
### L'historique est tronqué - Limite 255 caractères pour `input_text` - Format compact : `22/05: 60min, 42.5L, 24°C` - Seulement 5 dernières sessions
## Évolutions futures
- [ ] Support multi-zones (plusieurs vannes) - [ ] Prévisions météo avancées (radar pluie) - [ ] Graphiques consommation par mois - [ ] Export CSV historique détaillé - [ ] Intégration capteur humidité sol
## Support
Problème ? Ouvrez une issue sur GitHub avec : - Version Home Assistant - Logs de l'automatisation - Capture d'écran de la config

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
blueprint: name: "Smart Adaptive Plant Watering" description: > Intelligent automatic watering that adapts duration based on: - Current and forecasted temperature - Number of consecutive dry days (no significant rain) - Relative humidity - Recent or forecasted rain - Wind speed (evaporation) Baseline: 1h = normal daily watering needs. Uses a weather entity (e.g. IRM KMI Belgium) as data source. domain: automation input: # --- Control entities --- watering_switch: name: "Watering Switch/Valve" description: "The switch entity that controls watering" selector: entity: domain: switch
# --- Trigger --- watering_time: name: "Watering time" description: "Trigger time (early morning recommended)" default: "06:00:00" selector: time: {}
# --- Weather source --- weather_entity: name: "Weather entity" description: > Weather integration entity (e.g. weather.irm_kmi_home for IRM Belgium, or weather.openweathermap). Must provide temperature, humidity, wind_speed attributes. default: "weather.irm_kmi_home" selector: entity: domain: weather
rain_sensor_today: name: "Today's precipitation sensor (optional)" description: > Cumulative rain sensor for today in mm. If not available, rain data from the weather entity forecast will be used. default: "" selector: entity: domain: sensor
# --- Configuration thresholds --- temperature_normale: name: "Normal reference temperature" description: "Temperature considered normal for Belgium (°C)" default: 22 selector: number: min: 15 max: 35 unit_of_measurement: "°C"
temperature_canicule: name: "Heatwave threshold" description: "Above this temperature, heatwave mode is activated" default: 30 selector: number: min: 30 max: 45 unit_of_measurement: "°C"
rain_cancel_threshold: name: "Rain to cancel watering (mm)" description: "If rain >= this threshold, watering is cancelled" default: 5 selector: number: min: 1 max: 30 unit_of_measurement: "mm"
rain_reduction_threshold: name: "Rain to reduce watering (mm)" description: "If rain >= this threshold, watering is reduced" default: 2 selector: number: min: 0.5 max: 15 step: 0.5 unit_of_measurement: "mm"
base_duration_minutes: name: "Base duration (minutes)" description: "Watering duration for a normal day (60 = daily needs)" default: 60 selector: number: min: 10 max: 120 unit_of_measurement: "min"
max_duration_minutes: name: "Maximum duration (minutes)" description: "Max watering duration even during heatwave" default: 120 selector: number: min: 60 max: 180 unit_of_measurement: "min"
min_duration_minutes: name: "Minimum duration (minutes)" description: "Min watering duration (if not cancelled)" default: 15 selector: number: min: 5 max: 60 unit_of_measurement: "min"
dry_days_counter: name: "Consecutive dry days counter (helper)" description: > An input_number helper that tracks consecutive days without significant rain. Create an input_number helper (0-30) in HA. Example ID: input_number.dry_days_counter selector: entity: domain: input_number
water_volume_sensor: name: "Water volume sensor (SONOFF SWV)" description: > The water consumption sensor exposed by your SONOFF SWV valve. In Zigbee2MQTT: sensor.<name>_water_consumed Reports cumulative liters since last reset. selector: entity: domain: sensor
cumulative_liters_counter: name: "Cumulative water usage counter (optional)" description: > An input_number helper to track total liters used over time. Create an input_number helper (0-99999) in HA. Leave empty to skip. Example ID: input_number.watering_cumulative_liters default: "" selector: entity: domain: input_number
current_status: name: "Current status display (optional)" description: > An input_text helper to store current watering status for dashboard display. Create an input_text helper (max 255 chars) in HA. Leave empty to skip. Example ID: input_text.watering_current_status default: "" selector: entity: domain: input_text
watering_history: name: "Watering history (optional)" description: > An input_text helper to store last 5 watering sessions summary. Create an input_text helper (max 255 chars) in HA. Leave empty to skip. Example ID: input_text.watering_history default: "" selector: entity: domain: input_text
enable_notifications: name: "Enable notifications" description: "Send a notification with the watering summary" default: true selector: boolean: {}
notification_service: name: "Notification service" description: "E.g.: notify.mobile_app_my_phone" default: "notify.notify" selector: text: {}
mode: single max_exceeded: silent
trigger: - platform: time at: !input watering_time
variables: # Inputs temp_normale: !input temperature_normale temp_canicule: !input temperature_canicule duree_base: !input base_duration_minutes duree_max: !input max_duration_minutes duree_min: !input min_duration_minutes seuil_annulation: !input rain_cancel_threshold seuil_reduction: !input rain_reduction_threshold notif_active: !input enable_notifications notif_service: !input notification_service weather_ent: !input weather_entity rain_sensor: !input rain_sensor_today trigger_compteur: !input dry_days_counter capteur_volume: !input water_volume_sensor compteur_litres: !input cumulative_liters_counter statut_helper: !input current_status historique_helper: !input watering_history
# Sensor values from weather entity attributes temperature: "{{ state_attr(weather_ent, 'temperature') | float(25) }}" humidite: "{{ state_attr(weather_ent, 'humidity') | float(50) }}" vent: "{{ state_attr(weather_ent, 'wind_speed') | float(0) }}" weather_condition: "{{ states(weather_ent) }}"
# Rain: use dedicated sensor if available, otherwise estimate from weather condition pluie_jour: > {% if rain_sensor != '' %} {{ states(rain_sensor) | float(0) }} {% elif weather_condition in ['rainy', 'pouring'] %} 6 {% elif weather_condition in ['lightning-rainy'] %} 8 {% else %} 0 {% endif %}
# Rain forecast: check if weather condition suggests upcoming rain # IRM KMI exposes forecast data - we use the current condition as proxy prevision_pluie: > {% if weather_condition in ['rainy', 'pouring', 'lightning-rainy'] %} 80 {% elif weather_condition in ['partlycloudy', 'cloudy', 'fog'] %} 30 {% else %} 0 {% endif %}
jours_sans_pluie: "{{ states(trigger_compteur) | float(0) }}"
# --- WATERING COEFFICIENT CALCULATION ---
# Temperature factor: +2% per degree above normal, -2% below coef_temperature: > {{ 1 + ((temperature - temp_normale) * 0.02) }}
# Humidity factor: dry air = more watering, humid air = less # Reference 50%. Each 10% below = +10% watering coef_humidite: > {{ 1 + ((50 - humidite) * 0.01) }}
# Wind factor: wind increases evaporation # +5% per 10 km/h coef_vent: > {{ 1 + (vent / 10 * 0.05) }}
# Consecutive dry days factor: cumulative soil drying # +8% per consecutive day without significant rain coef_jours_sans_pluie: > {{ 1 + (jours_sans_pluie * 0.08) }}
# Rain factor: proportional reduction coef_pluie: > {% if pluie_jour >= seuil_annulation %} 0 {% elif pluie_jour >= seuil_reduction %} {{ 1 - (pluie_jour / seuil_annulation) }} {% else %} 1 {% endif %}
# Rain forecast factor (if probability > 70% or > 5mm forecasted, reduce) coef_prevision: > {% if prevision_pluie > 70 %} 0.5 {% elif prevision_pluie > 40 %} 0.75 {% else %} 1 {% endif %}
# Global coefficient coef_global: > {{ (coef_temperature * coef_humidite * coef_vent * coef_jours_sans_pluie * coef_pluie * coef_prevision) | round(2) }}
# Calculated duration duree_calculee: > {% set d = (duree_base * coef_global) | round(0) %} {% if coef_pluie == 0 %} 0 {% elif d > duree_max %} {{ duree_max }} {% elif d < duree_min %} {{ duree_min }} {% else %} {{ d }} {% endif %}
# For summary arrosage_annule: "{{ duree_calculee | int == 0 }}" raison_annulation: > {% if pluie_jour >= seuil_annulation %} Sufficient rain today ({{ pluie_jour }}mm) {% else %} Normal conditions {% endif %}
condition: []
action: # --- Update consecutive dry days counter --- - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ pluie_jour | float(0) >= seuil_reduction }}" sequence: - action: input_number.set_value target: entity_id: !input dry_days_counter data: value: 0 default: - action: input_number.increment target: entity_id: !input dry_days_counter
# --- Watering or cancellation --- - choose: # CASE 1: Watering cancelled (too much rain) - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ arrosage_annule }}" sequence: # Update status - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ statut_helper != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_text.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ statut_helper }}" data: value: "❌ Cancelled: {{ raison_annulation }} ({{ now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M') }})" default: []
# Send notification - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ notif_active }}" sequence: - action: "{{ notif_service }}" data: title: "️ Watering cancelled" message: > Watering cancelled: {{ raison_annulation }}. Temperature: {{ temperature }}°C | Humidity: {{ humidite }}% Rain: {{ pluie_jour }}mm | Condition: {{ weather_condition }} default: []
# CASE 2: Adaptive watering default: # Capture volume before watering - variables: volume_avant: "{{ states(capteur_volume) | float(0) }}"
# Update status: in progress - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ statut_helper != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_text.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ statut_helper }}" data: value: " In progress: {{ duree_calculee }}min ({{ now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M') }})" default: []
# Start notification - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ notif_active }}" sequence: - action: "{{ notif_service }}" data: title: " Smart watering started" message: > Duration: {{ duree_calculee }} min (base {{ duree_base }} min × coef {{ coef_global }}) Details: ️ Temp: {{ temperature }}°C (coef {{ coef_temperature | round(2) }}) Humidity: {{ humidite }}% (coef {{ coef_humidite | round(2) }}) ️ Wind: {{ vent }} km/h (coef {{ coef_vent | round(2) }}) ☀️ Dry days: {{ jours_sans_pluie }} (coef {{ coef_jours_sans_pluie | round(2) }}) ️ Rain: {{ pluie_jour }}mm (coef {{ coef_pluie | round(2) }}) Forecast: {{ prevision_pluie }}% (coef {{ coef_prevision }}) ⛅ Condition: {{ weather_condition }} default: []
# Turn on watering - action: switch.turn_on target: entity_id: !input watering_switch
# Wait for calculated duration - delay: minutes: "{{ duree_calculee | int }}"
# Turn off watering - action: switch.turn_off target: entity_id: !input watering_switch
# Small delay to let sensor update after valve closes - delay: seconds: 10
# Capture volume after watering and calculate delta - variables: volume_apres: "{{ states(capteur_volume) | float(0) }}" litres_session: "{{ (volume_apres - volume_avant) | round(1) }}" summary_line: "{{ now().strftime('%d/%m') }}: {{ duree_calculee }}min, {{ litres_session }}L, {{ temperature }}°C"
# Update status: completed - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ statut_helper != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_text.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ statut_helper }}" data: value: "✅ Completed: {{ litres_session }}L in {{ duree_calculee }}min ({{ now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M') }})" default: []
# Update history (keep last 5 sessions) - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ historique_helper != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_text.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ historique_helper }}" data: value: > {% set old = states(historique_helper) %} {% if old == 'unknown' or old == '' %} {{ summary_line }} {% else %} {% set lines = old.split(' | ') %} {% set new_lines = ([summary_line] + lines)[:5] %} {{ new_lines | join(' | ') }} {% endif %} default: []
# End notification - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ notif_active }}" sequence: - action: "{{ notif_service }}" data: title: "✅ Watering complete" message: > Watering finished after {{ duree_calculee }} minutes. Water used: {{ litres_session }} L (measured by SWV) Next watering tomorrow. default: []
# Update cumulative liters counter if configured - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ compteur_litres != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_number.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ compteur_litres }}" data: value: "{{ (states(compteur_litres) | float(0) + litres_session | float(0)) | round(1) }}" default: []

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
blueprint: name: "Smart Adaptive Plant Watering" description: > Intelligent automatic watering that adapts duration based on: - Current and forecasted temperature - Number of consecutive dry days (no significant rain) - Relative humidity - Recent or forecasted rain - Wind speed (evaporation) Baseline: 1h = normal daily watering needs. Uses a weather entity (e.g. IRM KMI Belgium) as data source. domain: automation input: # --- Control entities --- watering_switch: name: "Watering Switch/Valve" description: "The switch entity that controls watering" selector: entity: domain: switch
# --- Trigger --- watering_time: name: "Watering time" description: "Trigger time (early morning recommended)" default: "06:00:00" selector: time: {}
# --- Weather source --- weather_entity: name: "Weather entity" description: > Weather integration entity (e.g. weather.irm_kmi_home for IRM Belgium, or weather.openweathermap). Must provide temperature, humidity, wind_speed attributes. default: "weather.irm_kmi_home" selector: entity: domain: weather
rain_sensor_today: name: "Today's precipitation sensor (optional)" description: > Cumulative rain sensor for today in mm. If not available, rain data from the weather entity forecast will be used. default: "" selector: entity: domain: sensor
# --- Configuration thresholds --- temperature_normale: name: "Normal reference temperature" description: "Temperature considered normal for Belgium (°C)" default: 22 selector: number: min: 15 max: 35 unit_of_measurement: "°C"
temperature_canicule: name: "Heatwave threshold" description: "Above this temperature, heatwave mode is activated" default: 30 selector: number: min: 30 max: 45 unit_of_measurement: "°C"
rain_cancel_threshold: name: "Rain to cancel watering (mm)" description: "If rain >= this threshold, watering is cancelled" default: 5 selector: number: min: 1 max: 30 unit_of_measurement: "mm"
rain_reduction_threshold: name: "Rain to reduce watering (mm)" description: "If rain >= this threshold, watering is reduced" default: 2 selector: number: min: 0.5 max: 15 step: 0.5 unit_of_measurement: "mm"
base_duration_minutes: name: "Base duration (minutes)" description: "Watering duration for a normal day (60 = daily needs)" default: 60 selector: number: min: 10 max: 120 unit_of_measurement: "min"
max_duration_minutes: name: "Maximum duration (minutes)" description: "Max watering duration even during heatwave" default: 120 selector: number: min: 60 max: 180 unit_of_measurement: "min"
min_duration_minutes: name: "Minimum duration (minutes)" description: "Min watering duration (if not cancelled)" default: 15 selector: number: min: 5 max: 60 unit_of_measurement: "min"
dry_days_counter: name: "Consecutive dry days counter (helper)" description: > An input_number helper that tracks consecutive days without significant rain. Create an input_number helper (0-30) in HA. Suggested ID: input_number.smart_watering_dry_days selector: entity: domain: input_number
water_volume_sensor: name: "Water volume sensor (SONOFF SWV)" description: > The water consumption sensor exposed by your SONOFF SWV valve. In Zigbee2MQTT: sensor.<name>_water_consumed Reports cumulative liters since last reset. selector: entity: domain: sensor
cumulative_liters_counter: name: "Cumulative water usage counter (optional)" description: > An input_number helper to track total liters used over time. Create an input_number helper (0-99999) in HA. Leave empty to skip. Suggested ID: input_number.smart_watering_total_liters default: "" selector: entity: domain: input_number
current_status: name: "Current status display (optional)" description: > An input_text helper to store current watering status for dashboard display. Create an input_text helper (max 255 chars) in HA. Leave empty to skip. Example ID: input_text.watering_current_status default: "" selector: entity: domain: input_text
watering_history: name: "Watering history (optional)" description: > An input_text helper to store last 5 watering sessions summary. Create an input_text helper (max 255 chars) in HA. Leave empty to skip. Example ID: input_text.watering_history default: "" selector: entity: domain: input_text
enable_notifications: name: "Enable notifications" description: "Send a notification with the watering summary" default: true selector: boolean: {}
notification_service: name: "Notification service" description: "E.g.: notify.mobile_app_my_phone" default: "notify.notify" selector: text: {}
mode: single max_exceeded: silent
trigger: - platform: time at: !input watering_time
variables: # Inputs temp_normale: !input temperature_normale temp_canicule: !input temperature_canicule duree_base: !input base_duration_minutes duree_max: !input max_duration_minutes duree_min: !input min_duration_minutes seuil_annulation: !input rain_cancel_threshold seuil_reduction: !input rain_reduction_threshold notif_active: !input enable_notifications notif_service: !input notification_service weather_ent: !input weather_entity rain_sensor: !input rain_sensor_today trigger_compteur: !input dry_days_counter capteur_volume: !input water_volume_sensor compteur_litres: !input cumulative_liters_counter statut_helper: !input current_status historique_helper: !input watering_history
# Sensor values from weather entity attributes temperature: "{{ state_attr(weather_ent, 'temperature') | float(25) }}" humidite: "{{ state_attr(weather_ent, 'humidity') | float(50) }}" vent: "{{ state_attr(weather_ent, 'wind_speed') | float(0) }}" weather_condition: "{{ states(weather_ent) }}"
# Rain: use dedicated sensor if available, otherwise estimate from weather condition pluie_jour: > {% if rain_sensor != '' %} {{ states(rain_sensor) | float(0) }} {% elif weather_condition in ['rainy', 'pouring'] %} 6 {% elif weather_condition in ['lightning-rainy'] %} 8 {% else %} 0 {% endif %}
# Rain forecast: check if weather condition suggests upcoming rain # IRM KMI exposes forecast data - we use the current condition as proxy prevision_pluie: > {% if weather_condition in ['rainy', 'pouring', 'lightning-rainy'] %} 80 {% elif weather_condition in ['partlycloudy', 'cloudy', 'fog'] %} 30 {% else %} 0 {% endif %}
jours_sans_pluie: "{{ states(trigger_compteur) | float(0) }}"
# --- WATERING COEFFICIENT CALCULATION ---
# Temperature factor: +2% per degree above normal, -2% below coef_temperature: > {{ 1 + ((temperature - temp_normale) * 0.02) }}
# Humidity factor: dry air = more watering, humid air = less # Reference 50%. Each 10% below = +10% watering coef_humidite: > {{ 1 + ((50 - humidite) * 0.01) }}
# Wind factor: wind increases evaporation # +5% per 10 km/h coef_vent: > {{ 1 + (vent / 10 * 0.05) }}
# Consecutive dry days factor: cumulative soil drying # +8% per consecutive day without significant rain coef_jours_sans_pluie: > {{ 1 + (jours_sans_pluie * 0.08) }}
# Rain factor: proportional reduction coef_pluie: > {% if pluie_jour >= seuil_annulation %} 0 {% elif pluie_jour >= seuil_reduction %} {{ 1 - (pluie_jour / seuil_annulation) }} {% else %} 1 {% endif %}
# Rain forecast factor (if probability > 70% or > 5mm forecasted, reduce) coef_prevision: > {% if prevision_pluie > 70 %} 0.5 {% elif prevision_pluie > 40 %} 0.75 {% else %} 1 {% endif %}
# Global coefficient coef_global: > {{ (coef_temperature * coef_humidite * coef_vent * coef_jours_sans_pluie * coef_pluie * coef_prevision) | round(2) }}
# Calculated duration duree_calculee: > {% set d = (duree_base * coef_global) | round(0) %} {% if coef_pluie == 0 %} 0 {% elif d > duree_max %} {{ duree_max }} {% elif d < duree_min %} {{ duree_min }} {% else %} {{ d }} {% endif %}
# For summary arrosage_annule: "{{ duree_calculee | int == 0 }}" raison_annulation: > {% if pluie_jour >= seuil_annulation %} Sufficient rain today ({{ pluie_jour }}mm) {% else %} Normal conditions {% endif %}
condition: []
action: # --- Update consecutive dry days counter --- - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ pluie_jour | float(0) >= seuil_reduction }}" sequence: - action: input_number.set_value target: entity_id: !input dry_days_counter data: value: 0 default: - action: input_number.increment target: entity_id: !input dry_days_counter
# --- Watering or cancellation --- - choose: # CASE 1: Watering cancelled (too much rain) - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ arrosage_annule }}" sequence: # Update status - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ statut_helper != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_text.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ statut_helper }}" data: value: "❌ Cancelled: {{ raison_annulation }} ({{ now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M') }})" default: []
# Send notification - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ notif_active }}" sequence: - action: "{{ notif_service }}" data: title: "️ Watering cancelled" message: > Watering cancelled: {{ raison_annulation }}. Temperature: {{ temperature }}°C | Humidity: {{ humidite }}% Rain: {{ pluie_jour }}mm | Condition: {{ weather_condition }} default: []
# CASE 2: Adaptive watering default: # Capture volume before watering - variables: volume_avant: "{{ states(capteur_volume) | float(0) }}"
# Update status: in progress - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ statut_helper != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_text.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ statut_helper }}" data: value: " In progress: {{ duree_calculee }}min ({{ now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M') }})" default: []
# Start notification - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ notif_active }}" sequence: - action: "{{ notif_service }}" data: title: " Smart watering started" message: > Duration: {{ duree_calculee }} min (base {{ duree_base }} min × coef {{ coef_global }}) Details: ️ Temp: {{ temperature }}°C (coef {{ coef_temperature | round(2) }}) Humidity: {{ humidite }}% (coef {{ coef_humidite | round(2) }}) ️ Wind: {{ vent }} km/h (coef {{ coef_vent | round(2) }}) ☀️ Dry days: {{ jours_sans_pluie }} (coef {{ coef_jours_sans_pluie | round(2) }}) ️ Rain: {{ pluie_jour }}mm (coef {{ coef_pluie | round(2) }}) Forecast: {{ prevision_pluie }}% (coef {{ coef_prevision }}) ⛅ Condition: {{ weather_condition }} default: []
# Turn on watering - action: switch.turn_on target: entity_id: !input watering_switch
# Wait for calculated duration - delay: minutes: "{{ duree_calculee | int }}"
# Turn off watering - action: switch.turn_off target: entity_id: !input watering_switch
# Small delay to let sensor update after valve closes - delay: seconds: 10
# Capture volume after watering and calculate delta - variables: volume_apres: "{{ states(capteur_volume) | float(0) }}" litres_session: "{{ (volume_apres - volume_avant) | round(1) }}" summary_line: "{{ now().strftime('%d/%m') }}: {{ duree_calculee }}min, {{ litres_session }}L, {{ temperature }}°C"
# Update status: completed - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ statut_helper != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_text.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ statut_helper }}" data: value: "✅ Completed: {{ litres_session }}L in {{ duree_calculee }}min ({{ now().strftime('%d/%m %H:%M') }})" default: []
# Update history (keep last 5 sessions) - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ historique_helper != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_text.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ historique_helper }}" data: value: > {% set old = states(historique_helper) %} {% if old == 'unknown' or old == '' %} {{ summary_line }} {% else %} {% set lines = old.split(' | ') %} {% set new_lines = ([summary_line] + lines)[:5] %} {{ new_lines | join(' | ') }} {% endif %} default: []
# End notification - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ notif_active }}" sequence: - action: "{{ notif_service }}" data: title: "✅ Watering complete" message: > Watering finished after {{ duree_calculee }} minutes. Water used: {{ litres_session }} L (measured by SWV) Next watering tomorrow. default: []
# Update cumulative liters counter if configured - choose: - conditions: - condition: template value_template: "{{ compteur_litres != '' }}" sequence: - action: input_number.set_value target: entity_id: "{{ compteur_litres }}" data: value: "{{ (states(compteur_litres) | float(0) + litres_session | float(0)) | round(1) }}" default: []

option.name: updatedContent
